mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE MENU_TREE AS ( -- ROOT 메뉴 SELECT SYS_MENU_CD , UPR_MENU_CD , MENU_NM , MENU_LVL , MENU_SORT , MENU_SYS_DIV , MENU_DIV , MENU_URL , BRD_CD , USE_YN , CAST(SYS_MENU_CD AS CHAR(1000)) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_CD , CAST(MENU_NM AS CHAR(1000)) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_NM , CAST(LPAD(MENU_SORT, 3, '0') AS CHAR(1000)) AS SORT_KEY , 1 AS DEPTH FROM TB_SYS_MENU WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND MENU_SYS_DIV = #{menuSysDiv} AND (UPR_MENU_CD IS NULL OR UPR_MENU_CD = '')
UNION ALL
-- 자식 메뉴 SELECT T.SYS_MENU_CD , T.UPR_MENU_CD , T.MENU_NM , T.MENU_LVL , T.MENU_SORT , T.MENU_SYS_DIV , T.MENU_DIV , T.MENU_URL , T.BRD_CD , T.USE_YN , CONCAT(MT.MENU_FULL_PATH_CD, ' > ', T.SYS_MENU_CD) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_CD , CONCAT(MT.MENU_FULL_PATH_NM, ' > ', T.MENU_NM) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_NM , CONCAT(MT.SORT_KEY, '.', LPAD(T.MENU_SORT, 3, '0')) AS SORT_KEY , MT.DEPTH + 1 AS DEPTH FROM TB_SYS_MENU T INNER JOIN MENU_TREE MT ON T.UPR_MENU_CD = MT.SYS_MENU_CD WHERE T.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.MENU_SYS_DIV = #{menuSysDiv} )
SELECT A.* , IFNULL(B.CHILD_COUNT, 0) AS CHILD_COUNT FROM MENU_TREE A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UPR_MENU_CD, COUNT(*) AS CHILD_COUNT FROM TB_SYS_MENU WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND MENU_SYS_DIV = #{menuSysDiv} GROUP BY UPR_MENU_CD ) B ON A.SYS_MENU_CD = B.UPR_MENU_CD ORDER BY A.SORT_KEY

WITH RECURSIVE MENU_TREE AS ( -- ROOT 메뉴 SELECT SYS_MENU_CD , UPR_MENU_CD , MENU_NM , MENU_LVL , MENU_SORT , MENU_SYS_DIV , MENU_DIV , MENU_URL , BRD_CD , USE_YN , BIGO , CAST(SYS_MENU_CD AS CHAR(1000)) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_CD , CAST(MENU_NM AS CHAR(1000)) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_NM , CAST(LPAD(MENU_SORT, 3, '0') AS CHAR(1000)) AS SORT_KEY , 1 AS DEPTH FROM TB_SYS_MENU WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND MENU_SYS_DIV = #{searchMenuSysDiv} AND (UPR_MENU_CD IS NULL OR UPR_MENU_CD = '')
UNION ALL
-- 자식 메뉴 SELECT T.SYS_MENU_CD , T.UPR_MENU_CD , T.MENU_NM , T.MENU_LVL , T.MENU_SORT , T.MENU_SYS_DIV , T.MENU_DIV , T.MENU_URL , T.BRD_CD , T.USE_YN , T.BIGO , CONCAT(MT.MENU_FULL_PATH_CD, ' > ', T.SYS_MENU_CD) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_CD , CONCAT(MT.MENU_FULL_PATH_NM, ' > ', T.MENU_NM) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_NM , CONCAT(MT.SORT_KEY, '.', LPAD(T.MENU_SORT, 3, '0')) AS SORT_KEY , MT.DEPTH + 1 AS DEPTH FROM TB_SYS_MENU T INNER JOIN MENU_TREE MT ON T.UPR_MENU_CD = MT.SYS_MENU_CD WHERE T.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T.MENU_SYS_DIV = #{searchMenuSysDiv} )
SELECT A.* , IFNULL(B.CHILD_COUNT, 0) AS CHILD_COUNT FROM MENU_TREE A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UPR_MENU_CD, COUNT(*) AS CHILD_COUNT FROM TB_SYS_MENU WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND MENU_SYS_DIV = #{searchMenuSysDiv} GROUP BY UPR_MENU_CD ) B ON A.SYS_MENU_CD = B.UPR_MENU_CD ORDER BY A.SORT_KEY
